Comment: Least-privilege policy for the Relay AGENT component (relay.agent + its tools) — Module 10, skill 3.2.1. The Strands agent reasons on the smart/fast inference profiles through converse(), applies the relay-guardrail in-line and standalone (relay.safety), reads order status (GetItem) from relay-orders, writes a TicketRecord to relay-tickets, and runs the search_kb tool against the relay-kb Knowledge Base. Every action and resource is explicit: the two table ARNs (read-only on orders, write on tickets — the exact M7 boundary), the guardrail and Knowledge Base ARNs (resolved from their SYSTEM ids at deploy via ${GUARDRAIL_ID}/${KB_ID} — a name-based ARN never matches the live resource), and the SMART-tier inference profile it is allowed to call (the agent reasons on SMART only; it never uses the fast/nova-micro tier or DynamoDB Query/BatchGetItem). No '*', no admin, no S3. ${ACCOUNT_ID}/${REGION} substituted by setup.py from STS.
